rulings.Case Title: 1929 UNION, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL VS. GARO OUSTAYAN, AN INDIVIDUAL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration Supporting Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Supporting Declarations Of Garo Oustayan And James A. Quadra Request For Judicial Notice Proposed Order Granting Motion
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 19, 2022 line 1. DEFENDANT GARO OUSTAYAN, DIAMOND BROKERS OF LOS ALTOS, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration is continued to October 7, 2022 on Court's own motion. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: BACKYARD INDUSTRIES, LLC VS. ERWIN GALINATO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order That Deposition Of Defendants Karen Brown And Myrna Brown Not Be Taken
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 19, 2022 line 7. DEFENDANT ERWIN GALINATO, KAREN BROWN, MYRNA BROWN Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order That Deposition Of Defendants Karen Brown And Myrna Brown Not Be Taken is GRANTED, subject to opposition, as follows: (1) Karen Brown shall appear for deposition on September 20, 2022 remotely. Plaintiff's counsel to arrange for remove appearance (Zoom link, etc). (2) Myrna Brown to appear for deposition remotely on September 22, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. or provide complete written verified responses to deposition questions within 24 hours of receipt of the questions. Plaintiff's counsel to provide deposition questions to Myrna Brown no later than 9:00 a.m. on September 21, 2022. If Myrna Brown responds to deposition questions in writing in lieu of appearing for remote deposition, Plaintiff may serve supplemental/follow-up questions by 2:00 p.m. on September 22, 2022 and Myrna Brow shall provide complete verified responses by 2:00 p.m. on September 23, 2022. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.
